summary: Iteration 105: EchoAi3 Performance Intelligence & ROI Analytics. Backend: 15/15 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: All 5 tabs tested successfully (Timeline, Efficiency, Break-Even, ROI Breakdown, BEO Search). Key validation: ROI per-beo total_manual_minutes = ~307 (frequency-weighted, NOT 675). Annual hours saved at 50 events/day = ~87,360 (NOT 192,000 before fix).
critical_code_review_comments: Break-even analysis correctly calculates minimum covers to profit with proforma scenarios
Department efficiency scoring shows 6 departments with 95% target, status indicators (on_target, needs_improvement, critical)
Timeline data provides horizontal scrolling view with covers, labor hours, BEO count per date
ROI per-BEO uses frequency multipliers (freq_per_beo) to weight batched tasks - reduces inflated estimates
Annual ROI at 50 events/day now shows ~87,360 hours saved (was ~192,000 before frequency fix)
BEO search supports both BEO number and company name queries
CSV export includes events and department analysis with labor hours breakdown
seed_data_creation: Uses existing BEO documents and labor_efficiency collection. Simulated efficiency data when no real entries exist.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 105 tested Performance Intelligence panel with 5 tabs: Timeline (horizontal scrolling chart with covers/labor/BEO bars, department labor table), Efficiency (6 department cards with gauge bars, 95% target), Break-Even (proforma scenarios with profit/margin), ROI Breakdown (frequency-weighted task table, annual impact), BEO Search (by number or company). Key fix validated: frequency multipliers reduce ROI estimates from inflated ~192K to realistic ~87K annual hours saved.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/echoai3/performance/break-even - returns break_even_covers, scenarios, revenue_per_person - PASSED
GET /api/echoai3/performance/department-efficiency - returns 6 departments with status - PASSED
GET /api/echoai3/performance/timeline - returns timeline array with dates, covers, labor_hours, department_lines - PASSED
GET /api/echoai3/performance/search?company=test - returns BEO search results - PASSED
GET /api/echoai3/performance/search?beo_number=1001 - returns BEO by number - PASSED
GET /api/echoai3/performance/export?date_from=2026-01-01&date_to=2026-12-31 - returns events and department_analysis - PASSED
GET /api/echoai3/performance/similar/nonexistent-id - returns 404 for nonexistent BEO - PASSED
GET /api/echoai3/roi/per-beo - returns frequency-weighted task breakdown (total_manual_minutes ~307) - PASSED
GET /api/echoai3/roi/annual - returns annual savings with default 12 events/day - PASSED
GET /api/echoai3/roi/daily - returns daily savings with chef_hours_saved - PASSED
GET /api/echoai3/roi/live - returns actual operations savings - PASSED
Frequency multipliers reduce totals - weighted < raw total - PASSED

mocked_apis.note: Toast POS, QuickBooks, SendGrid/Resend APIs are mocked (awaiting user keys). All performance endpoints use real MongoDB data.
